answers.question: Would you like to apply for Start-up/MSME/Industrial Entrepreneur registration? (Check additional information for eligibility?)
Do you require any of the following Intellectual Property for your business?
Do you have a legal entity registered in India?
Are you a new entity employing labour for your project?
Will you be involved in trading of goods? (Import/Export)
Which sector(s) best describes your project/ business activity?
Would you be establishing any of the following facilities?
answer: Building /Construction projects/Area Development projects and Townships
Export Oriented Units (EOU)/ Electronic Hardware Technology Park (EHTP), Software Technology Park (STP)/ Bio-Technology Park (BTP)

answers.question: Please indicate if you would require any of the following 'Special Clearances' to establish your business?
Would you be needing any of the following registrations/certifications from BIS (Bureau of Indian Standards) or LM (Legal Metrology)?
answer: Manufacture Non standard Weights and Measures

answers.question: Do you deal in Essential Commodities? If yes, please select your desired activity:
Please select all products/services applicable to your business which you would additionally like to apply for:
answer: Explosives & Fireworks (Including Gunpowder and Ammonium Nitrate)

answers.question: Would you be manufacturing plastic carry bags?
Will your business activity require dealing in chemicals? (Toxic, Hazardous, Petrochemicals, Chemicals & Fertilizers)
Whether there is any foreign investment proposed from outside India and/or from a foreign owned or controlled Indian entity?
Is your project(s) located in any of the following areas?
Will you be carrying out activities on Forest/Wildlife Area/Eco Sensitive Zone ?
Do you require clearing and breaking of forest land for non-forest purposes?
Do you require Diversion in National Park/Wildlife Sanctuary for commercial activities ?
Will you undertake developmental projects within 10kms of National Park/Wildlife Sanctuary?
Please indicate project location:
Do you wish to construct/erect a structure within 20 Kms of a VFR airport or beyond 56 km from the IFR airport and requested height of proposed structure is less than 150 m Above Ground Level (AGL)?
